scripts.build: npm run update-shared && npx vite build && ./vendor/bin/jigsaw build production
scripts.build-erd: for f in source/_mermaid/*.mmd; do npx @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli@latest -c erd-config.json -p puppeteer-config.json -i "$f" -o "source/assets/images/erd/$(basename "$f" .mmd).svg"; done && npm run linkify-erd
